# currentState

**Instance Property**

The state machine’s current state.

## Declaration

```swift
var currentState: GKState? { get }
```

## Discussion

A state machine can be in only one of its states at a time. To transition to another state, call the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKStateMachine/enter(_:)] method.

When you call the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKStateMachine/update(deltaTime:)] method, the state machine calls the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKState/update(deltaTime:)] method on its current state object.

## Working with States

- **canEnterState(_:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether it is valid for the state machine to transition from its current state to a state of the specified class.
- **enter(_:)**: Attempts to transition the state machine from its current state to a state of the specified class.
- **update(deltaTime:)**: Tells the current state object to perform per-frame updates.
